text:
Created attachment 155084
Patch for Mediawiki 1.24.2 against r382906

Mediawiki 1.24.2 has several security and other bug fixes:
https://lists.wikimedia.org/pipermail/mediawiki-announce/2015-March/000175.html

No plist changes were necessary (checked using 'make check-orphans').
